_meta.description: SYNC Marketplace seed data — 32 real food partners in Ho Chi Minh City; each partner has 8 real-world menu items. 16 partners are healthy/plant-based/clean-eating.
_meta.schema: Compatible with Marketplace.SeedTool KitchenSeedDto/DishSeedDto: kitchens -> Partner + FoodMenuItem. Extra fields such as locationAccuracy/realWorldSourceNote are ignored by current System.Text.Json seed DTOs.
_meta.locationNote: Addresses are real public listings. Lat/lng are address-level approximate coordinates for seeding geospatial search; verify against Google Maps/OSM before production.
_meta.nutritionNote: Nutrition values are estimated for app/demo seed only, not official nutrition labels from the restaurants.
_meta.priceNote: Prices are approximate VND seed prices based on typical public listing/menu ranges and may change.
_meta.imageStrategy: Full 256-item dish-specific pass. Every menu item ImageUrls is rebuilt from an optimized dish-name query based on nameEn/nameVi/category. Beverages use drink/glass queries, soups use soup queries, salads use salad queries, rice/noodle dishes use exact Vietnamese dish queries. No generic shared food image query is reused across unrelated dishes.
_meta.emailNote: Partner email values are synthetic @sync.local seed emails because public emails are not consistently available.
_meta.logoUrlPolicy: LogoUrl is populated only when an official or brand Facebook page/ID was found. The URL is the Facebook public profile-picture endpoint and may redirect to the current CDN image. If no official/logo source was confidently verified, LogoUrl is null. CoverImageUrl and menu ImageUrls remain the previous Unsplash/Pexels demo fallbacks.
_meta.imageFields: Partner images use LogoUrl and CoverImageUrl. Menu item images use ImageUrls.
_meta.imageProductionNote: These are direct query-based image endpoints intended for seed/demo preview. For production, manually preview/download approved images from Unsplash/Pexels/official sources and store immutable copies in S3/MinIO.
_meta.imageHotfixNote: Removed deprecated/broken source.unsplash.com dynamic URLs. ImageUrls now contains only non-source.unsplash.com direct URLs; items without stable direct image URL are [] to avoid Application Error.
